summary: Comprehensive testing of MEDVET INTEGRATIVA veterinary medicine e-commerce platform completed. Backend API tests achieved 95% success rate (19/20 tests passed). Frontend UI and integration tests were highly successful with all major features working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 401 when accessing user consultations without proper session management
minor_bugs.impact: User consultation history not accessible via API test, but this is expected behavior for unauthenticated requests

minor_issues.issue: Category card navigation works but filter state may not be visually active immediately
WhatsApp product consultation buttons not found during automated testing

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, categories, featured products, testimonials, FAQ)
Navigation links work correctly (Produtos, Dicas, Consultas)
Product page loads with filtering and search functionality
Consultation page loads with complete scheduling form and calendar
Admin login successful with admin@medvet.com / admin123
Dashboard page loads after login showing user interface
FAQ accordion expands and collapses correctly
All hero section CTAs work (Agendar Consulta, Ver Produtos)
Category cards navigation to filtered products
Featured products section with 'Ver todos' link
Tips preview section with clickable cards
WhatsApp floating button present on homepage
Backend API endpoints: auth, products, categories, testimonials, tips, FAQ, contact
Authentication flows with JWT cookies and brute force protection
Data seeding and retrieval from MongoDB
